About Projects Publications Blog Contact

Architecting and deploying enterprise-scale AI solutions, specializing in Large Language Models (LLMs), RAG architectures, MLOps, and real-time AI systems. Proven track record in healthcare, education, and legal sectors.

View Projects Contact Me

About Me

As an , I possess proven expertise in architecting and deploying enterprise-scale AI solutions, specializing in LLMs, RAG architectures, MLOps, and real-time AI systems.

My background includes leading ML engineering at Aimped (USA, Remote, 2023-2024), driving innovation in biomedical NLP at Nioyatech (2020-2023), and delivering high-impact solutions across healthcare, education, and legal sectors. Currently, I am contributing my expertise as a Senior Data Scientist (Contract) at DopingTech (Since approx. Aug/Sep 2023).

I hold a completed Master's degree (2024) in Measurement and Data Analytics from Anadolu University and actively contribute to the open-source community, particularly with Turkish and Spanish language models on Hugging Face (>1000 downloads).

Download CV

Education & Research

  • M.S., Measurement and Data Analytics
    Anadolu University (2024)
  • B.S., Education
    Gaziosmanpaşa University (2004-2008)

  • Open Source: Turkish & Spanish Models on Hugging Face (1000+ downloads)

Signature Projects

Healthcare Clinical GloVe Embeddings

Domain-specific GloVe embeddings for healthcare NLP applications, offering 300-dimensional vectors that balance performance, interpretability, and efficiency for clinical text understanding and retrieval.

Learn more →

Intelligent Language Learning Platform

Real-time voice-based learning system integrating TTS, STT, and LLM services. Reduced response time by 65% with Redis caching. Scalable for 10K+ concurrent users. 95% user satisfaction.

Learn more →

Biomedical Information Retrieval System

Custom RAG architecture for medical literature achieving 85% relevancy. Specialized embeddings improved search accuracy by 40%. Processed 100K+ documents. Published research (arXiv:2407.12126).

Learn more →
View All Projects

Publications & Research

arXiv Paper

LLMs-in-the-loop Part-1: Expert Small AI Models for Bio-Medical Text Translation

A novel "LLMs-in-the-loop" approach demonstrating that small, specialized models trained on high-quality synthetic data can outperform larger LLMs in medical translation. Covers 6 language pairs.

Authors: Bunyamin Keles, Murat Gunay, Serdar I. Caglar

AI Amplified (Aimped) Inc.

July 29, 2024

Read PDF arXiv Link Details
Master's Thesis

Social Network Analysis of Oncology Theses

Knowledge graph analysis of 1726 Turkish medical thesis abstracts to discover patterns and trends in national cancer research using Neo4j.

Authors: Serdar I. Caglar

Anadolu University (Measurement and Data Analytics)

January 15, 2024

Details

AI Engineering • November 01, 2024

Architecting Production-Grade RAG: From Core Concepts to Advanced Strategies

Dive deep into building robust, scalable, and efficient Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems for production, covering advanced retrieval, agentic patterns, evaluation, and MLOps.
